summary: TWO_COLUMN: Axes left with f(t)=e^(0.5t) plus the damped integrand e^(-st)·e^(at) and its shaded area, both via always_redraw under ValueTracker s. Right column has live s, F(s) value (only valid when s > a), formula 1/(s-a), and a mini F(s)-vs-s plot with vertical asymptote at s=a and a tracking cursor.
